name: linGetOEMWakeupInd
title: linGetOEMWakeupInd
description: With this function it's possible to query the wake-up indication bit of a Slave node.
Without parameter, the wake-up indication bit of the calling slave is returned or zero if the caller is not a slave node.

parameters.name: slaveName
parameters.description: Name of the queried Slave node as specified in the database.

return: -1: Function call not allowed, execution failed or invalid slave name given.
